hero.tagline: Cinematographic editor focused on rhythm, energy, and striking narrative.

about.title: Cuts that
about.p1: I'm Yuri Coelho — a Beginner video editor obsessed with rhythm, color, and the tension between silence and impact. My work blends cinematic storytelling with raw energy focused on directing the viewer. I love being the one who moves, the one who builds tension, and the one who provides focus — from ad videos.
about.p2: Every cut is intentional. Every frame is a frame I would watch twice.

skills.title: Made for
skills.tagline: Four disciplines, one signature. Every project is an exercise in rhythm.

social.tagline: Connect, send a message and let's make something memorable.
